meta.title: Det daglege ordspelet
meta.description: Gjett det gøymde ordet på 6 forsøk (eller færre). Eit nytt puslespel kvar dag!
meta.keywords: norsk nynorsk, puslespel, ord, spel, på nett, gjette, dagleg

unlimited.title: Play unlimited — no waiting
unlimited.description: Play unlimited Wordle in Norwegian Nynorsk. No waiting — get a new word every time.

speed.title: Speed Streak — race the clock
speed.description: Speed Streak: solve as many Wordle words in Norwegian Nynorsk as you can in 5 minutes.

dordle.title: Dordle — 2 boards at once
dordle.description: Play Dordle in Norwegian Nynorsk. Solve 2 Wordle boards at once with 7 guesses.

tridle.title: Tridle — 3 boards at once
tridle.description: Play Tridle in Norwegian Nynorsk. Solve 3 Wordle boards at once with 8 guesses.

quordle.title: Quordle — 4 boards at once
quordle.description: Play Quordle in Norwegian Nynorsk. Solve 4 Wordle boards at once with 9 guesses.

text.no_attempts: You haven't tried any words yet!
text.share_challenge_win: Eg løyste dagens Wordle på {n} forsøk. Klarar du det betre?
text.share_challenge_lose: Eg klarte ikkje dagens Wordle. Klarar du det?
text.hard_mode_position: Vanskeleg modus: {letter} må vere i posisjon {position}

help.title: How to Play
help.text_1_2: Each guess must be a valid five letter word. Press the enter button to submit your guess.
help.text_1_3: After you guess, the tiles will change color to indicate which letters of your word are correct or almost correct.
help.text_2_1: is in the word and in the correct location!
help.text_2_2: is in the word, but not in the correct location.
help.text_2_3: is not present in the word you are trying to guess.
help.text_3: A new word will be available each day!

ui.play_more_languages: Spel fleire språk for å sjå global statistikk!
ui.play_daily_like_app: Spel Wordle dagleg som ein app
ui.no_games_yet: Du har ikkje spelt noko spel endå. Vel eit språk for å starte!
ui.easy_desc: Alle ord godtekne, sjølv om dei ikkje er i ordboka
ui.normal_desc: Gjettingar må vere gyldige ord frå ordboka
ui.hard_desc: Avdekte hint må brukast i seinare gjettingar
ui.todays_word_reveal: Dagens ord — Spel for å avsløre!
ui.future_word: Dette ordet har ikkje vorte spelt endå. Kom att seinare!
ui.difficulty_locked: Kan ikkje endre vanskegrad etter gjetting
